auth.resetDescription: Enter your email and we'll send a link to reset your password.
auth.resetSuccessDesc: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive a link to reset your password.
auth.invalidLinkExpired: The recovery link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
auth.invalidLinkUsed: The link has already been used or has expired. Please request a new recovery link.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

athleteTickets.title: My Tickets
athleteTickets.description: Requests and reports you've submitted to the technical team.
athleteTickets.emptyDesc: Create your first request using the button above.
athleteTickets.newDesc: Describe your request or report and the technical team will respond promptly.
athleteTickets.titlePlaceholder: Briefly describe the problem or request
athleteTickets.descriptionPlaceholder: Detail what happened, when it occurred, what you expected…
athleteTickets.statusBannerOpen: Your ticket is in the queue and will be attended soon.
athleteTickets.statusBannerInProgress: The technical team is working on your request.
athleteTickets.statusBannerDone: Your ticket has been {status}. If you need more help, open a new one.
